rationale: In the citing editorial, Netzer et al. (2019) appears only as one item in a long historical list of JMR articles used to illustrate the breadth of mitigation-related topics. The paper is referenced by topic label (textual signals of loan default) without any direct engagement with its theory, methods, measures, or findings. There is no indication that this specific article structures the editorial's conceptual definition of mitigation in marketing beyond serving as an example citation.
